name: Mel on her way to Noxus
description:
| Arcane|

| Season 2 |

"[...] This blood is alien to me. Yet it has dictated the course of my entire life. I am no more than a passenger. A life I spent in self-pity. Now it's gone. I can never return to it."

  • Mel Medarda

After the death of her mother, Mel left Piltover and the Council and took her mother's battle mask, as well as command of her warband. She returned to Noxus on her mother's warship in search of answers. Heading to the shores of Rokrund, currently in the middle of the sea.

Art: It's literally just from the show, go watch it.

(All characters depicted are 18 years old or above.)
creator: baenni
